title: Authenticated IP Registration, Simulated Blockchain Badges, and Full IPGT Coin Removal

requirements.summary: Gate IP registration behind Internet Identity login and completed profile setup, while keeping the IP database publicly accessible
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /register-ip while unauthenticated shows a login prompt instead of the form.
Visiting /register-ip while authenticated but profile-incomplete triggers the ProfileSetupModal before showing the form.
Visiting /register-ip while authenticated and profile-complete shows the registration form immediately.
The IP database at /database remains publicly accessible without login.

file_operations.description: Add authentication and profile completion guards to the IP registration page. Use the authorization component's useInternetIdentity hook to check authentication status. Use useGetCallerUserProfile to verify profile completion. Display a login prompt for unauthenticated users. Trigger ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a complete profile. Only show the registration form when both authentication and profile setup are complete. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add organisation field to ProfileSetupModal alongside existing display name and email fields
acceptanceCriteria: The ProfileSetupModal form contains fields for display name (required), organisation (optional), and email (optional).
On submission, all three values are sent to the backend.
The modal cannot be dismissed without completing at least the display name field.
Styling matches the existing dark navy/gold theme.

file_operations.description: Update the registration page to handle the new profile structure including the organisation field when checking profile completion status.

Add an 'Organisation' text input field (optional) to the profile setup form, positioned between the display name and email fields. Update the form state and submission logic to include the organisation value. Ensure the styling matches the existing dark navy/gold theme with consistent spacing and typography. The modal remains non-dismissible until at least the display name is provided.

Update the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation and related query hooks to handle the new UserProfile structure that includes the organisation field. Ensure type consistency with the backend interface definition.

requirements.summary: Display simulated cross-chain references (Ethereum and Solana) in the registration success modal with clear disclaimer
acceptanceCriteria: The RegistrationSuccessModal displays an 'Also Recorded On' section with mock Ethereum and Solana references.
Each reference shows a transaction ID/signature and a block/slot number.
A disclaimer label clearly indicates this is a simulated future integration layer.
All IPGT coin, burn fee, and token language is absent from the modal.
Styling matches the dark navy/gold theme.

file_operations.description: Remove all IPGT coin, burn fee, and token balance references from the modal. Add a new 'Also Recorded On' section displaying simulated cross-chain references. Generate mock Ethereum transaction ID (0x followed by 64-character hex string) with block number, and mock Solana transaction signature (base58 string) with slot number. Include a prominent disclaimer such as 'Future Integration — Simulated Reference' to clarify these are not live cross-chain transactions. Style the section with the dark navy/gold theme using appropriate spacing, borders, and typography consistent with the existing modal design.

requirements.summary: Display simulated cross-chain references in the IP detail modal below existing blockchain metadata
acceptanceCriteria: IPDetailModal shows an 'Also Recorded On' section with mock ETH and Solana references.
The section is clearly labelled as a future/simulated integration.
ICP canister metadata and other existing fields remain intact.
Styling is consistent with the dark navy/gold theme.

file_operations.description: Add a simulated 'Also Recorded On' section below the existing blockchain metadata (ICP canister details, block height, timestamp). Display mock Ethereum transaction ID (0x + 64-char hex) with block number and mock Solana transaction signature (base58) with slot number. Include a clear disclaimer label such as 'Future Integration — Simulated Reference'. Preserve all existing IP record fields and metadata. Style consistently with the dark navy/gold theme.

requirements.summary: Remove all IPGT Coin, token balance, burn fee, and payment references from every frontend page, component, modal, and route
acceptanceCriteria: No page, modal, form, or component in the app displays IPGT coin balance, burn fee, token transfer, or any coin/token language.
The /coin-dashboard route is removed or redirects away.
The Coin Dashboard page is either deleted or emptied of all token-related UI.
TokenStats component is not rendered on any page.
Header does not show a coin balance for authenticated users.
RegistrationSuccessModal shows no burn fee or token amount.
Footer contains no coin/token language.

file_operations.description: Remove the /coin-dashboard route definition from the router configuration. Ensure the ProfileSetupModal integration remains functional.

Remove all IPGT token balance checks, minimum balance requirements, burn fee references, and token-related UI elements from the registration form. Remove any TokenStats component rendering. Keep only the core IP registration form fields and file upload functionality. Retain authentication and profile completion guards added in REQ-36.

Remove all token balance display, token statistics, and token transfer form UI from the Coin Dashboard page. Either delete the entire page content or replace it with a simple message indicating this feature has been removed. This page is effectively deprecated since the route is removed in App.tsx.

Remove any IPGT coin balance display for authenticated users from the header. Retain the user display name, navigation links, and login/logout button functionality. Ensure the header continues to show the authenticated user's profile name when logged in.

Remove all IPGT coin, token, and payment-related language from the footer text, feature lists, and navigation links. Preserve the IPGT brand name, platform navigation, shield icon features, copyright year, and caffeine.ai attribution. Ensure the dark navy/gold theme styling remains intact.

Remove any TokenStats component rendering and all IPGT token/coin references from the landing page. Preserve the hero section with the generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-globe-vivid.dim_1920x900.png, the 'How It Works' explainer, and links to IP registration and database pages. Ensure all token-related language is removed from headings, descriptions, and call-to-action text.
